user_query: Give me a full picture of our commercial activity in Brussels.

plan.query: Give me a full picture of our commercial activity in Brussels.
plan.reasoning: To provide a comprehensive view of commercial activity in Brussels, we need to gather data from all available agents regarding CRM relationships, emails and events, and physical presence or related product information.

steps.task: Retrieve all accounts, contacts, opportunities, and cases related to our commercial activity in Brussels.
Gather all communication history, including emails and calendar events, related to our activities in Brussels.
Collect information about locations, store sites, and catalog items related to our commercial presence in Brussels.

plan.synthesis: Combine the information from salesforce, graph, and smartsales to create a comprehensive overview of our commercial activity in Brussels.
